title: Tick Control in Somers, NY | Professional Tick Extermination | $125-$325

intro: Somers, NY residents face significant tick exposure due to the area's abundant wooded landscapes, parks, and proximity to natural habitats. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with targeted treatments designed for Somers properties. We provide comprehensive tick elimination and prevention services for homes near Reis Park, Lasdon Park, and throughout the Somers community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings decades of experience serving Westchester County with specialized tick control solutions tailored to Somers' unique landscape and ecology. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks from your yard, garden, and property perimeter.
localContext: Somers' rural character, with properties near wooded areas like the Ward Pound Ridge Reservation and numerous horse farms and estates, creates ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Homes along Heritage Hills, near Muscoot Farm, and throughout residential neighborhoods require proactive tick management to ensure safe outdoor enjoyment throughout the spring and summer seasons.

faqs.question: Why is tick control so important in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Somers has a high tick population due to its wooded areas, parks, and wildlife habitats. Ticks carry Lyme disease and other serious illnesses, making professional control essential for protecting your family and pets, especially during peak season from April through October.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Somers?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Somers range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer seasonal programs and one-time treatments to fit your needs and budget.

faqs.question: When is the best time to treat for ticks in Somers?
faqs.answer: The best time to begin tick control in Somers is early spring (April-May) before tick populations peak. We recommend continued treatments through fall, with applications every 4-6 weeks during peak season for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treated areas are typically safe for re-entry within 2-4 hours after application dries, and we provide specific guidance for each treatment.
